program.description: Executable invoked directly without an implicit shell.

args.description: Exact argv passed to the executable.

cwd.description: Optional project-relative working directory for the command.

items.description: User-supplied string that must contain visible content, not just whitespace.

envAllowlist.description: Non-secret parent environment names explicitly forwarded to the command.

TestCommandInvocation.description: Canonical deterministic command invocation; no implicit shell parsing.
